name: Balatro
description: Trainer for Balatro (Proton, v1.0.1o). Uses Lua injection with love.update hooks for continuous enforcement. Each cheat installs a small hook on first enable, controlled by a flag for enable/disable.

fields.name: Infinite Money
fields.on_enable_lua: G.GAME.dollars=999; _ssM=true; if not _ssMP then _ssMP=true; local u=love.update; love.update=function(d) if _ssM then G.GAME.dollars=999 end; return u(d) end end

fields.name: Infinite Hands
fields.on_enable_lua: _ssH=true; if not _ssHP then _ssHP=true; local u=love.update; love.update=function(d) if _ssH and G.GAME.current_round then G.GAME.current_round.hands_left=99 end; return u(d) end end

fields.name: Infinite Discards
fields.on_enable_lua: _ssD=true; if not _ssDP then _ssDP=true; local u=love.update; love.update=function(d) if _ssD and G.GAME.current_round then G.GAME.current_round.discards_left=99 end; return u(d) end end

fields.name: Large Hand Size
fields.description: Increases hand size to 12 cards. Takes effect on next draw.
